Vendored browser runtime used only by the local PyWebView interface.

- React 18.3.1 production UMD
- ReactDOM 18.3.1 production UMD
- License: MIT (see REACT_LICENSE.txt)
- react.production.min.js SHA-256: d949f1c3687aedadcedac85261865f29b17cd273997e7f6b2bfc53b2f9d4c4dd
- react-dom.production.min.js SHA-256: 35f4f974f4b2bcd44da73963347f8952e341f83909e4498227d4e26b98f66f0d

The GUI uses React without JSX or a build step. These files are loaded only
from the installed package; no remote CDN or runtime network access is used.
